contentSnippet: A former AFL star, who had a stellar 12-season career, defrauded six families of tens of thousands of dollars through his pool installation business.

title: Dezi Freeman shot dead by police
contentSnippet: Victoria’s top cop has reacted to reports fugitive Dezi Freeman was armed and wrapped in a blanket when he was shot dead in a standoff with police.

title: ABC rapped over Four Corners episode breach
contentSnippet: An episode of ABC flagship show Four Corners breached accuracy and impartiality rules, it has been found.

title: ‘Not involved’: AFL stars deny brawl claims
contentSnippet: Charges against two AFL players over their alleged involvement in a Boxing Day brawl may be withdrawn as police continue to seek out witnesses, a court has been told.

title: Eye-watering amount Aussies lose to scams
contentSnippet: Losses on gambling and sports scams have tripled as Aussies lost a staggering amount of money to scammers in 2025.

Australia police kills man suspected of killing two officers
contentSnippet: After a seven‑month manhunt involving hundreds of officers, Australian police finally caught up with Desmond Freeman, one of the country's most‑wanted criminals.

title: Amnesty International flags World Cup human rights risks
contentSnippet: The human rights group has sounded the alarm about risks faced by visitors to this summer's World Cup. It goes as far as to describe the situation in the United States as a "human rights emergency."

title: Iran war: Israel approves billions in new military funds
contentSnippet: Israel's new, defense-heavy budget comes as its forces fight Iran and the Lebanese Hezbollah militia, while also pursuing operations in Gaza. The UN said one of its peacekeeper was killed in Lebanon. Follow DW for more.

title: Russian students duped into signing contracts with military
contentSnippet: University students are being recruited to serve in drone units fighting Ukraine. They are offered lucrative contracts and promised they won't be sent to the front. Reports suggest those promises are not always kept.
